zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Wastneys於大約1408年出生在英國越可爾霍爾梅時，她的父親Adam Wastney47歲，母親Ada34歲。她於從1419年到1429年與John Holmes Sr在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1430年享年23歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Wastneys于大约1408年出生在英国越可爾霍爾梅时，她的父亲Adam Wastney47岁，母亲Ada34岁。她于从1419年到1429年与John Holmes Sr在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1430年享年23岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Wastneys was born about 1408, in Holme, Yorkshire, England, her father, Adam Wastney, was 47 and her mother, Ada, was 34. She married John Holmes Sr from 1419 to 1429, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1430, at the age of 23, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Wastneys est née environ 1408, à Holme, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Adam Wastney, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Ada, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé John Holmes Sr du 1419 au 1429, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1430, à l’âge de 23 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Wastneys um 1408 in Holme, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Adam Wastney 47 und ihre Mutter Ada 34. Sie hat von 1419 bis 1429 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom John Holmes Sr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1430 im Alter von 23 Jahren und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Wastneys è nata il circa 1408 nel Holme, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Adam Wastney, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Ada, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato John Holmes Sr da 1419 a 1429, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1430, all'età di 23 anni, e fu sepolta a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wastneysが約1408年にイギリスヨークシュアイアホールメで生まれた時，父Adam Wastneyは47歳，母Adaは34歳であった。から1419年まで1429年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでJohn Holmes Srと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1430年に23歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.Paull, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 폴 위스 토른구볼드

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wastneys(이)가 대략 1408년 영국 요르크실르 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adam Wastney(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ada(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1419년 부터 1429년 까지 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 John Holmes Sr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1430년 23세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Wastneys nasceu aproximadamente 1408, em Holme, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Adam Wastney, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Ada, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com John Holmes Sr de 1419 a 1429, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Wastneys родилась около 1408 г. в местности холм, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Adam Wastney было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Ada, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Holmes Sr с 1419 по 1429 в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1430 г. в возрасте 23 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.
